item.title: Cut Crease Cheat Sheet for Hooded Eyes
item.description: Learn a cut crease technique for hooded eyes with this simple makeup tutorial. Get helpful tips to define the crease and enhance your eye look.

item.title: Leave a small gap for a sharper wing
item.description: Learn a simple eyeliner tip for a sharp, professional-looking flick. Leaving a small gap can help create a cleaner winged liner finish.

item.title: How to Create a Sharp Wing in One Stroke
item.description: Learn a simple eyeliner trick for a sharp wing. Move slightly down from the tip to join the lash line for extra precision.
